steps.title: Identify the greatest common factor
steps.content:
In the expression 7x + 28, find a common factor of both terms:
  • 7x = 7 · x
  • 28 = 7 · 4
The greatest common factor (GCF) is 7.

steps.title: Factor out the GCF
steps.content:
Divide each term by 7 and write the result inside parentheses:
7x + 28 = 7(x + 4)

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: $7 \times (x + 4)$ — distributing gives 7x + 28. That matches Choice A — $7 \times (x + 4)$.
  • Choice B: $7 \times (x + 21)$ — distributing gives 7x + 147 ≠ 7x + 28. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: $7 \times (x + 28)$ — distributing gives 7x + 196 ≠ 7x + 28. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: $7 \times (x + 35)$ — distributing gives 7x + 245 ≠ 7x + 28. Eliminated.
That matches Choice A — $7 \times (x + 4)$.
